{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260320162450FBED1A5A00F11CCD1B19"}"},"total":2750},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7332507396970119961","common":{"comment_type":20,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"这本书是吧，有一些缺点，有一点小崩但问题不大。还有很多细节可以处理的更好，很多词语都可以换一下，效果更好。按理来讲，这本书三到四星的评价。从我的性格考虑，我会给四星，但是我比较喜欢这本书里主角的性格。所以五星。合情合理。
有一说一，纯路人，非引战，理中客，非粉非黑。这本书5星，没毛病。[你细品][奸笑]"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1707234130,"group_id":"7300958047411637300","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"本人中学生，练文笔，哪里写的不好，希望指出来，望海涵","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N3YXUnZ2cVXI1IpObFhrMzQQJByaisx/7+nolvMy+81O","gender":0,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":1,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/1d5adf73523047d48cfa02213f0aea35~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776528458&x-signature=4ilyF9a2z4aSt28SyVMb6%2F7dvXg%3D","user_id":"1614556011695064","user_name":"不酸的醋"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"1614556011695064","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7300958047411637300","book_info":{"abstract":"【宇宙级游戏+网游+剧情流+无敌+杀伐果断+不圣母+宝物获取】
无穷宇宙，亿兆兆之种族被拉进了一场生死游戏。
无论是巅峰种族，还是弱小的人类，都不能幸免。
胜者得永生，败者抹杀
而秦寒在游戏开启的时候，带着前世的骨灰级经验进入游戏。
之后，百无禁忌，一路横推，
直到踏上诸天万界最顶端。","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/baa5f7d5c0e25fd249f0583bd3ece84f","author":"一剑千古寒","author_id":"","book_id":"7300958047411637300","book_name":"万族游戏开启，我独证不朽！","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#482818","creation_status":"0","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"4.7万人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":746,"name":"游戏体育","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=746&name=游戏体育&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":36,"name":"重生","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=36&name=重生&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":71,"name":"诸天万界","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=71&name=诸天万界&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":372,"name":"网游","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=372&name=网游&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":384,"name":"无敌","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=384&name=无敌&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7300958142064984616","read_count":"46870","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"2324981"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"8.4","serial_count":"1079","tags":"游戏体育,重生,诸天万界,网游,无敌","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/a60aed868b4065c6cefc27326f3b2634~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779179090&x-signature=SwZlXj07DudsXztfKeCF37fdLa8%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"3381733861370941","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"60"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260320162450FBED1A5A00F11CCD1B19"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读2小时后点评"},"stat":{"digg_count":11,"forwarded_count":0,"listen_duration":5449,"read_book_count":0,"read_duration":8406,"reply_count":2,"show_pv":20880},"user_action":{"author":0,"is_author_sti
